items.claim: Magomed Tulov has seven amateur fights.
items.quote: do find a little bit of comfort in his seven amateur fights.

items.claim: Magomed Tulov has never fought a fighter currently in the UFC.
items.quote: he hasn't fought a UFC fighter. I mean, I guess Kyle Machado, but he hasn't fought a guy that's actively in the UFC. This is his debut.

items.claim: Magomed Tulov potentially has a glass chin and a skinny neck.
items.quote: if Tulov's got a little bit of a glass chin, he is a little skinny with that neck.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim wilts and breaks when hit hard.
items.quote: hit him hard, he's going to will. He breaks. We've seen it time and time and time again. Ismail Bonfam, he's a bit of a certified quitter, man.

items.claim: Axel Sola has a height and reach advantage over Ismael Bonfim at 6'0" with a 74-inch reach.
items.quote: 6' tall versus 5'8. 74 inch reach 71 and a half.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim suffered a doctor stoppage loss against Sidharta.
items.quote: the Sid Car fight was a doctor stoppage to be fair, but still finished there.

items.claim: Sam Patterson is 30 years old with a 14-3 record.
Santiago Ponzanibio is 1-4 in his last four fights.
items.quote: he's one and three in his last four.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzanibio is nearly 40 years old and hasn't fought in a year and two months since being knocked out by D-Rod.
items.quote: nearly 40. Fight before that, Carlson Harris knockout win... Has not fought in a year and two months.

items.claim: Sam Patterson holds a five-inch reach advantage and a three-inch height advantage over Santiago Ponzanibio.
items.quote: Five inch reach advantage, three-inch height advantage, nine years younger.
